clues.clue: Rapunzel's silent sidekick in 'Tangled' is this kind of color-shifting reptile.
Mulan is accompanied by Mushu and a 'lucky' one of these chirping insects.
In 'Moana,' name the dim-witted pet pig left behind when the heroine sets sail.
Pocahontas's companions are a hummingbird named Flit and this curious raccoon.
In 'The Princess and the Frog,' this trumpet-playing alligator longs to join a jazz band.
This Amazonian hero lives among humans under the name Diana Prince.
Black Panther rules the nation of Wakanda under this royal given name.
This blind Hell's Kitchen attorney moonlights as a horned vigilante.
The Silver Age Flash is this Central City forensic scientist.
Hal Jordan, wielder of a willpower-fueled ring, belongs to this intergalactic peacekeeping force.
clues.response: What is the Green Lantern Corps?

clues.clue: In 'Finding Nemo,' name the anxious clownfish father searching for his son.
In 'Ratatouille,' this refined-palate rat dreams of becoming a chef.
This acorn-obsessed saber-toothed squirrel-rat provides slapstick in the 'Ice Age' films.
In 'Madagascar,' name the lemur king who performs 'I Like to Move It.'
This 1998 DreamWorks ant film opened the same year as Pixar's 'A Bug's Life.'
This Marvel team is billed as 'Earth's Mightiest Heroes.'
Professor Charles Xavier founded this mutant team at his school for gifted youngsters.
This cosmic Marvel team includes a sentient tree and a gun-toting raccoon.
clues.response: Who are the Guardians of the Galaxy?

clues.clue: DC's Justice League debuted in 1960 in the anthology 'The Brave and the' this.
The Fantastic Four gained their powers from exposure to these high-energy space particles.
'Movin' on Up' is the theme to this 'All in the Family' spinoff.
The 'Cheers' theme's full title is this phrase about a welcoming bar.
clues.response: What is 'Where Everybody Knows Your Name'?

clues.clue: The 'Golden Girls' theme 'Thank You for Being a Friend' was a 1978 hit for this singer.
The Rembrandts' 'Friends' theme carries this title.
clues.response: What is 'I'll Be There for You'?

clues.clue: 'Love Is All Around' opened this 1970s sitcom about a Minneapolis newsroom.
clues.response: What is The Mary Tyler Moore Show?

final.clue: This reclusive artist co-created Spider-Man and Doctor Strange with Stan Lee before leaving Marvel.
